name: teamsters175.org
message: PROUDLY SERVING TEAMSTER MEMBERS AND THEIR FAMILIES IN WEST VIRGINIA, KENTUCKY, OHIO AND VIRGINIA SINCE 1940 Saturday, October 16th (next Saturday) at 10:00 a.m. at 267 Staunton Ave., South Charleston, WV 25309. Biscuits will be available. AHF members joined together for a Unity Rally for each shift to show their solidarity and support for a new better contract. Negotiations have been ongoing with a company that bought the plant sometime last year. They stand together stong and we stand with them. Teamsters Local 175 joins West Virginia AFL-CIO March 12, 2019 Facebook Twitter Email Google+ Share In an encouraging sign of unity within the West Virginia labor movement, the International Brotherhood of Teamsters Local 175 made a unanimous decision this past Saturday to affiliate with the West Virginia AFL-CIO.
